exclusions.sec_filing: file_path contains risk-10-k, or a path component 'sec', or filename matches \b(10[- ]?k|8[- ]?k|def[- ]?14a|proxy[- ]?statement)\b

dup_key_definition: md5(basename(file or member)|column_name|frac_integer|min|max|n_integer) — content fingerprint, NOT path; station-years stay distinct unless sampled stats collide
representative_rule: lexicographically smallest (file_path, archive_member, sheet_or_table, column_name) per dup_key
notes: exclusion is a flag; nothing moved/deleted. channel_kind + generating_process are metadata only.
